channel.title: hugo on Cupper
channel.description: Recent content in hugo on Cupper

item.title: 嵌入数学公式
item.description: Enable Katex in the config file by setting the katex param to true. This will import the necessary Katex CSS/JS. Note: Use the online reference of supported TeX functions. Some math: $$ \varphi = \dfrac{1+\sqrt5}{2}= 1.6180339887… $$ $$ \varphi = \dfrac{1+\sqrt5}{2}= 1.6180339887… $$ More math: $$ \varphi = 1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\cdots} } } $$ $$ \varphi = 1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\cdots} } } $$

item.title: markdown基本语法
item.description: 标题 ## Heading 2 ### Heading 3 #### Heading 4 ##### Heading 5 ###### Heading 6 Heading 2 Heading 3 Heading 4 Heading 5 Heading 6 文本 *这是斜体* _这样也是斜体_ **这是粗体** __这样也是粗体__ _你 **可以** 把他们结合在一起_ 这是斜体 这样也是斜体 这是粗体 这样也是粗体 你 可以 把他们结合在一起 列表 无序列表 * Item 1 * Item 2 * Item 2a * Item 2b Item 1 Item 2 Item 2a Item 2b 有序列表 1. Item 1 1. Item 2 1.

item.title: 各种文本嵌入方式
item.description: 块引用 {{< blockquote author="Carl Jung" >}} Even a happy life cannot be without a measure of darkness, and the word happy would lose its meaning if it were not balanced by sadness. It is far better to take things as they come along with patience and equanimity. {{< /blockquote >}} Even a happy life cannot be without a measure of darkness, and the word happy would lose its meaning if it were not balanced by sadness.
